title: pentas elatior
intro: Pentas elatior, also known as the star flower or elephant ear, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pentas elatior include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional African medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
